ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the client operates */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the client registered with the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the client operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial transaction */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "income" REAL /* Amount of income recorded in the transaction */,
  "expense" REAL /* Amount of expense recorded in the transaction */,
  "tax_owed" REAL /* Tax owed for the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., income, expense, tax payment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, credit card, cash) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_transactions_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., accountant, financial analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES financial_transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rates" (
  "tax_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate */,
  "state" TEXT /* State to which the tax rate applies */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate percentage */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the tax rate becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the tax rate expires */,
  "tax_type" TEXT /* Type of tax (e.g., sales tax, income tax) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for whom the invoice is generated */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., pending, paid, overdue) */,
  "pdf_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the PDF version of the invoice */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms for the invoice (e.g., net 30, net 60) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_invoices_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bank_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank account */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the bank account */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number of the bank account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of bank account (e.g., checking, savings) */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank */,
  "routing_number" TEXT /* Routing number of the bank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bank_accounts_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment reminder */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice associated with the payment reminder */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date the payment reminder was sent */,
  "reminder_method" TEXT /* Method of payment reminder (e.g., email, mail) */,
  "reminder_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment reminder (e.g., sent, received) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_reminders_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES client_invoices ("invoice_id")
)
